title:
Case No. C30638718, SKA-23/2024. Decision of the Supreme Court of the Republic of Latvia (Senate) of 4 June 2024.
ECLI:LV:AT:2024:0604.C30638718.13.S,

Latvia
text:
Lieta Nr. /Case No. C30638718 (SKC‑23/2024).



The Supreme Court of the Republic of Latvia (The Senate),
civil case, involving SIA „Alma Career Latvia” (before name change „CV-Online
Latvia”) and SIA „Melons” regarding the prevention of a database creator’s
rights infringement in connection with the cassation appeal of SIA “Alma Career
Latvia” against the judgment of the Riga Regional Court of 25 February 2022.



Website www.cv.lv contains a
database, which includes job advertisements published by employers. The site
contains microdata-type meta tags, which allow Internet search engines to
better determine the content of each page in order to index it correctly.
issuing_authority: Supreme Court of the Republic of Latvia
